raw_consumer_statement:
My complaint is against CITI CARDS. for fraudulent charges on my XX/XX/year> statement. 
For the the first few months I was given credit while " investigating '' the two charges one for {$5700.00} and the other for {$1300.00}. These charges occured at a XXXX store in XXXX XXXX, CA. ( I live in XXXX, CA. ) I have sent registerd letters to Citi Cards and have documented everything. 
Here is what happened : A purchase at XXXX XXXX XXXX of roofing and building supplies for the {$5700.00} and another six days later at the same store for {$1300.00} in appliances. But on that same day I purchased stamps in XXXX XXXX with my card and have the receipt with my card number on it. The distance between these purchases is over XXXX miles. Citi Cards finally gave me credit for the {$1300.00} but not the other. 
I am XXXX XXXX XXXX, I don ' [ t purchase any more than XXXX per month on my card. The two fraudulent purchases were from the SAME STORE yet the credited me for just one of the charges, the smallest amount. I have all the receipts, letters, etc,.
